0.text: Linear-band fibroatelectasis changes in the right upper lobe posterior segment

1.text: Linear-band fibroatelectasis changes in both lower lobe posterobasal segments

2.text: 14 mm bleb formation in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Nonspecific parenchymal nodule less than 5 mm in the right middle lobe lateral segment

4.text: Nonspecific parenchymal nodule less than 5 mm in the left lower lobe superior segment

5.text: Ground glass nodule less than 5 mm in the laterobasal segments of both lower lobes
